items.title: AI is being used to resurrect the voices of dead pilots
items.summary: A new application of AI technology is enabling the resurrection of deceased pilots' voices, raising both ethical considerations and potential benefits for aviation training and historical preservation.

items.title: OpenAI named a Leader in enterprise coding agents by Gartner
items.summary: Gartner has recognized OpenAI as a leading provider of enterprise coding agents, highlighting the company's significant impact and advanced capabilities in automated software development.

items.title: How VCs and founders use inflated ‘ARR’ to crown AI startups
items.summary: An investigative report reveals how venture capitalists and startup founders may be inflating Annual Recurring Revenue (ARR) metrics to overvalue AI companies, potentially creating an unsustainable bubble.

items.title: Listen Labs raises $69M after viral billboard hiring stunt to scale AI customer interviews
items.summary: Listen Labs secured $69 million in funding following a highly successful viral marketing campaign, aiming to expand its AI-powered platform for conducting and analyzing customer interviews at scale.

items.title: TransitLM: A Large-Scale Dataset and Benchmark for Map-Free Transit Route Generation
items.summary: Researchers introduce TransitLM, a new large-scale dataset and benchmark designed to advance map-free transit route generation, enabling AI models to create efficient routes without relying on traditional map data.

items.title: Perception or Prejudice: Can MLLMs Go Beyond First Impressions of Personality?
items.summary: A new study investigates whether Multi-modal Large Language Models (MLLMs) can develop a deeper understanding of personality beyond initial superficial impressions, exploring the nuances of AI perception.

items.title: How Virgin Atlantic ships faster with Codex
items.summary: Virgin Atlantic is leveraging OpenAI's Codex to accelerate its software development and deployment processes, demonstrating a practical application of AI in streamlining enterprise operations.

items.title: The Most Concerning AI Risk of 2026
items.summary: An article discusses the most pressing AI risk anticipated for 2026, prompting reflection on potential societal and technological challenges as AI continues to evolve rapidly.

items.title: SOLAR: A Self-Optimizing Open-Ended Autonomous Agent for Lifelong Learning and Continual Adaptation
items.summary: Researchers introduce SOLAR, a new autonomous agent designed for lifelong learning and continual adaptation through self-optimization, promising advancements in persistent AI systems.

items.title: DelTA: Discriminative Token Credit Assignment for Reinforcement Learning from Verifiable Rewards
items.summary: This paper presents DelTA, a novel method for discriminative token credit assignment that improves reinforcement learning by enabling models to learn more effectively from verifiable rewards.

items.title: How we're using Gemini Embeddings to build a smarter, community-driven feed on DEV
items.summary: DEV.to is enhancing its community-driven content feed by integrating Google's Gemini Embeddings, aiming to provide users with a more intelligent and personalized experience.

items.title: Tool-Augmented Agent for Closed-loop Optimization,Simulation,and Modeling Orchestration
items.summary: This paper proposes a tool-augmented agent capable of orchestrating closed-loop optimization, simulation, and modeling, enhancing the capabilities of AI agents in complex problem-solving scenarios.

items.title: π-Bench: Evaluating Proactive Personal Assistant Agents in Long-Horizon Workflows
items.summary: π-Bench is introduced as a new benchmark for thoroughly evaluating the performance of proactive personal assistant agents within complex, long-horizon workflows, addressing a critical need in agent development.

items.title: Full Attention Strikes Back: Transferring Full Attention into Sparse within Hundred Training Steps
items.summary: A new research paper demonstrates a method to efficiently transfer full attention mechanisms into sparse ones within a minimal number of training steps, potentially improving the efficiency of large models.

items.title: ACC: Compiling Agent Trajectories for Long-Context Training
items.summary: This research presents ACC, a novel approach for compiling agent trajectories to facilitate more effective long-context training, which is crucial for developing sophisticated AI agents.
